title: Resolution Respectfully Recommending to the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Further Seek and Consider Another Entity to Provide Swabbing Services to Our Constituents. (AUTHOR (S) : Councilor (s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 09/20/2021)
